runTitle: Vercel AI Assistant quality recheck after deterministic operator answer fix
coveredSurfaces: /dashboard/ai-assistant renders AI Workspace on production v8.11.28
Header profile menu accessible name includes visible guest identity and login state
System Context panel resolves AI Engine Online and Environment Production
Prompt 1 answer includes total server count and normal/warning/risk counts
Prompt 1 answer identifies exactly one highest-attention server with metric trend
Prompt 1 answer includes two immediate actions for the identified server
Prompt 2 answer returns CPU Top 3 ranking with current percentages in order
Prompt 2 answer returns one operator check item per ranked server
Production browser console shows 0 errors and 0 warnings
Production AI network capture shows wake-up 200, health 200, jobs 201, supervisor stream 200
skippedSurfaces: Reporter Agent full report generation rerun
Cloud Run admin /monitoring and /monitoring/traces direct run.app checks

aiLatencyObservations.surface: AI Assistant prompt 2 deterministic CPU top3

expertAssessments.rationale: The production AI Assistant now satisfies the previously failing operator prompts with exact counts, one attention server, two immediate actions, and one check item per ranked server.
System Context reports AI Engine Online, browser network captured production wake-up/health/stream endpoints, and browser console stayed clean during the targeted run.
The new operator guidance prioritizes direct investigation items aligned with CPU/disk symptoms instead of premature resource-upgrade language, which fits the project's free-tier operating rules.

usageChecks.summary: vercel usage --format json --non-interactive reviewed before v8.11.28 AI quality recheck; effective usage was 15.0518 USD while billed amount remained 0.0000 USD.

completedImprovements.title: 프로필 메뉴 접근성 이름에 visible user state 포함
completedImprovements.evidence: Production v8.11.28 header button renders '프로필 메뉴, GU, 게스트 사용자, 게스트 로그인'.

completedImprovements.title: AI 답변이 사용자가 요청한 항목 개수를 정확히 충족하도록 보강
completedImprovements.evidence: Prompt 1 now returns counts, one attention server, and two immediate actions in production v8.11.28.

completedImprovements.title: AI 운영 권고에서 리소스 업그레이드보다 조사/캐시/분산 조치를 우선
completedImprovements.evidence: Prompt 2 now returns symptom-specific operator checks for each ranked server without resource-upgrade language.

notes: The first prompt now routes through a deterministic operator summary path; the rendered UI shows two numbered actions even when the raw text copy omits markdown numbering markers.
The second prompt now returns exactly three ranked servers and exactly three server-specific follow-up checks on production v8.11.28.
GitLab tag deploy pipeline 2474844035 and main validate pipeline 2474844092 both completed successfully for commit 088eaf3f72c7110aaa892607db5e2c09236d08b4.
